title: LunaShell Client
description: LunaShell Client is a fully client-side Minecraft optimization pack focused on higher FPS, smoother gameplay, and refined Quality-of-Life improvements without altering vanilla mechanics.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12683dcfacc0fafa015087079b92b2bd9b9e9e26_0.webp)

## LunaShell Client  
**Client-Side Performance, Quality-of-Life, Animation & Optimization Suite**

**LunaShell Client** is a **primarily client-side Minecraft optimization modpack**, with approximately **95% of its functionality operating entirely on the client**.  
It is designed to deliver **consistently high performance, stable frame rates, and a refined user experience**, while strictly preserving vanilla gameplay mechanics.

In addition to comprehensive performance optimizations, LunaShell Client includes **carefully selected Quality-of-Life enhancements, punchy animation improvements, optional shader support, and selected social utility features**.  
All additional features are **entirely optional** and are not required for normal operation.

---

## Early Release Notice

LunaShell Client is a **newly released modpack** and is currently considered **early-stage**.

While extensive testing has been performed, **not all features may function perfectly in every environment**, and minor bugs, inconsistencies, or edge-case issues may still occur.

- Stability and compatibility improvements are ongoing  
- Some mods may receive updates or configuration refinements  
- User feedback is actively used to improve future releases  

By downloading this modpack, you acknowledge that it **may not yet function 100% as intended in all scenarios**. Regular updates will address issues as they are identified.

---

## Purpose

The primary objective of LunaShell Client is to enhance Minecraft’s technical performance while offering a clean, reliable, and mostly client-side experience through well-considered optimizations.

- Gameplay mechanics remain unchanged  
- No competitive or unfair advantages are introduced  
- No mandatory server-side installation is required  

---

## Core Benefits

### Performance & Stability
- Higher and more consistent frame rates  
- Reduced lag spikes and micro-stutters  
- Optimized memory allocation and management  
- Improved world, chunk, and asset loading performance  
- Reduced CPU and GPU workload  

---

## Punchy Animation Enhancements

LunaShell Client integrates **performance-conscious animation mods** that make Minecraft feel more responsive and dynamic — without altering vanilla mechanics.

Expect:

- Smoother first-person item movement  
- Refined hand and tool animations  
- Enhanced third-person player fluidity  
- Subtle idle motion improvements  
- Cleaner camera transitions  
- Responsive interaction feedback  

All animations are:

- Client-side only  
- Fully cosmetic  
- Carefully configured to avoid visual clutter  
- Optimized to maintain high FPS  

The result is a **more modern, fluid Minecraft experience** while staying true to vanilla gameplay.

---

## Quality-of-Life & Optional Visuals

- Client-side usability enhancements  
- Optional shader support for enhanced visuals  
- Smoother user interface transitions  
- Improved visual feedback without unnecessary noise  

All included components are tested for compatibility and configured to operate as a cohesive, lightweight client.

---

## Client-Side Focus & Optional Server Support

LunaShell Client is **approximately 95% client-side** by design and functions fully without any server-side modifications.

Certain features may offer **enhanced functionality** when compatible **optional server-side mods** are present (for example, extended player status visibility via supported implementations such as *What Are They Up To (WATUT)*).

- Server-side installation is entirely optional  
- The client remains fully functional without server-side support  
- No gameplay advantages are introduced  
- Server compatibility and server rules remain unaffected  

---

## Included Mod: Essentials

LunaShell Client includes **Essentials**, a client-focused utility mod that enhances social interaction and accessibility while maintaining full compatibility with vanilla gameplay and multiplayer servers.

Essentials provides optional features designed for convenience and social play, including:

- Cosmetic customization options (purely visual, no gameplay impact)  
- The ability to host temporary worlds for friends through peer-to-peer connections  
- Simple friend and invite systems for quick multiplayer sessions  
- Quality-of-Life tools focused on ease of use and player connectivity  

World hosting through Essentials allows players to invite friends into their singleplayer worlds **without requiring a dedicated server**.  
All features are optional, player-controlled, and do not modify core gameplay mechanics.

---

## Design Philosophy

LunaShell Client is developed according to a **minimalist, vanilla-first design philosophy**:

- Performance remains the primary focus  
- No mandatory shaders or visual overhauls  
- No intrusive or unnecessary interface modifications  
- No deviation from standard Minecraft mechanics  

Optional features can be enabled or disabled at the user’s discretion.

---

## Client-Side & Server Compatibility

- Operates primarily on the client  
- Compatible with all multiplayer servers  
- Safe for SMP, public servers, and private worlds  
- No risk of server-side conflicts or rule violations  

LunaShell Client may be used universally without restrictions.

---

## Support Notice

Official support is **exclusively provided for the default, unmodified LunaShell Client configuration**.  
If users add, remove, or modify included mods or configurations, **official support will no longer be provided**.

---

## Recommended Configuration

- **Allocated Memory:** 6–8 GB RAM  
- **Java:** Latest stable release recommended  
- Background applications should be minimized for optimal performance  

---

## Intended Audience

- Players seeking stable and consistent performance  
- Laptop and mid-range PC users  
- Multiplayer and SMP-focused players  
- Users who prefer a clean, reliable, and refined Minecraft client  

---

**LunaShell Client**  
Performance-focused. Refined. Responsive.
